subject: East Supreme Kai / Shin (Dragon Ball Super) — anime IP character, godly figure in robes with energy
description: A slender humanoid figure with white-silver hair stands in a composed, slightly forward-leaning posture. The figure wears a formal vest-and-bodysuit in a muted color, consistent with the Supreme Kai's distinctive appearance. Pale blue-white energy radiates from or around the figure in a controlled manner, suggesting restrained divine power. The background is a cool, bright energy field. The overall impression is composed authority rather than aggressive combat.
foreground: Slender humanoid with white-silver hair in formal bodysuit, pale energy radiating with composed stance
background: Cool pale blue-white energy field with soft light diffusion
emotion: composed authority, quiet power, watchful dignity
